name: Tabs
description: A set of layered sections (tab panels) that display one panel at a time, with tab elements that activate corresponding panels.

keyboard_interactions.action: Moves focus into tab list on active tab; next Tab exits to tab panel
Moves focus to previous tab (horizontal); wraps from first to last
Moves focus to next tab (horizontal); wraps from last to first
Moves focus to previous tab (vertical); wraps
Moves focus to next tab (vertical); wraps
Activates focused tab if not auto-activated on focus
(Optional) Closes the current tab and panel if deletable

required_attributes.description: true on active tab; false on inactive tabs

optional_attributes.description: menu or true if the tab has a popup

notes: Only one tab panel should be visible at a time
Consider automatic activation (focus = activate) for faster navigation
If tabpanel has no focusable elements, set tabindex='0' on the panel itself
